data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for real-time status updates indicating when a spot has been claimed by another user. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that such updates are sent to users who attempt to claim a spot after it has already been taken. The linked use case describes the expected behavior but lacks concrete evidence of the implementation, indicating a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of real-time status updates being sent to users.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for real-time updates
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that users receive a notification when a spot is claimed by another user.
